variable PRVDR_NUM) = 0 or the 3rd and 4th digits of PRVDR_NUM = 13. 

ACUTE_PERDIEM_PMT must be added to this field to obtain the total acute hospital Medicare payments 
for the year. The annual per diem variable was new in 2010; it will always be null/missing in earlier files. 

There are two cost/use categories from the IP data files: Acute and the OIP. 

Medicare payments are described in detail in a series of Medicare Payment Advisory Commission 
(MedPAC) documents called “Payment Basics”
